content:
MODULE: cosmos.network.cosmos_attestation
FILE: cosmos/network/cosmos_attestation.py (333 lines)
CATEGORY: network

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS GPU-Signed Model Attestation
=====================================

Hardware-attested model provenance — the first chain of custody for AI models
where the GPU hardware itself signs the model identity.

When a model loads on a GPU:
  attestation = BLAKE3(gpu_fingerprint || model_weight_hash |

CLASSES:
- ModelAttestation: A GPU-signed attestation that a specific model is running on specific hardware.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, d: Dict) -> 'ModelAttestation'
- ModelAttestor: GPU-Signed Model Attestation engine.

Creates and verifies hardware-bound attest
  Methods: def attest_model(self, model_name: str, use_weights: bool=True) -> ModelAttestation
  Methods: def verify_attestation(self, attestation: ModelAttestation, node_identity: bytes, gpu_fingerprint: b
  Methods: def verify_chain(self, attestations: List[ModelAttestation]) -> bool
  Methods: def add_remote_attestation(self, attestation: ModelAttestation)
  Methods: def get_trust_score(self, node_name: str) -> float
  Methods: def get_all_attestations(self) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: def get_chain_summary(self) -> Dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def compute_model_hash(model_name: str) -> bytes
- def compute_model_hash_with_weights(model_name: str) -> bytes
- def make_model_attest(sender: str, attestation: ModelAttestation) -> COSMOSPacket

INTERNAL DEPS: cosmos_config, cosmos_auth, cosmos_protocol
